title: EB-1A Approval Secured by Colombian Business Leader
content:
Every thriving economy depends on leaders who connect ideas, capital, and people. Our client, a Colombian business development expert, has dedicated his career to doing exactly that across Latin America. On August 28th, 2025, he gained EB-1A approval , opening the door to continue this work in the United States.
As a distinguished professional in international business development and investment promotion, he has designed strategies that boost industries and attract investment. These initiatives have created jobs and expanded opportunities for communities. His leadership has shaped national economies and earned him recognition from international media and elite professional associations. In the United States, he will foster trade relations and attract strategic investments.
Immigration Attorney Nizar Kafrouni shares how his client’s EB-1A extraordinary ability petition showcased exceptional achievements, leading to approval that recognized him as a top leader in international business development and investment promotion.

## From Local Challenges to Global Leadership
In Colombia’s shifting economy, our client discovered how vision and strategy could transform uncertainty into growth. During his career, he rose to senior leadership roles in major investment institutions. There, he created models that attracted global investors, generated thousands of jobs, and established platforms for sustainable growth.
Reflecting on his client’s career, Attorney Nizar Kafrouni noted: “Our client is a recognized leader in international business development, with over 20 years of experience driving investment and economic growth across Latin America and the United States. His work has created thousands of jobs, secured hundreds of millions in investment, and earned recognition in outlets such as the Los Angeles Times and Forbes Mexico. His record of leadership and measurable impact places him among the foremost experts in his field.”
His expertise soon drew international recognition. Notably, a national government invited him to lead an ambitious reform of its investment promotion system. That effort enhanced the country’s reputation, secured substantial inflows of capital, and expanded opportunities for its people.
In addition, a strong academic foundation supports his career. He holds a bachelor’s degree in economics, two master’s degrees in international business and capital markets, advanced diplomas in trade and banking management, and certifications in foreign direct investment and negotiation.
Finally, his achievements have earned recognition from exclusive professional associations and international media outlets. Together, these honors cement his reputation as a respected leader in business development and investment promotion.

## Extraordinary Achievements Questioned
Despite a career defined by groundbreaking investment models, national economic reforms, and thousands of jobs created, USCIS questioned whether the evidence truly captured his extraordinary ability in international business development and investment promotion.
The agency issued a Request for Evidence (RFE) that placed his entire record under scrutiny, specifically:
- Whether his membership in an exclusive association required outstanding achievement for admission.
- Whether he has performed in a leading or critical role for organizations that have a distinguished reputation.
- If international media coverage submitted qualified as “major” publications.
- Whether his original contributions and leadership roles had clear and significant importance.
- If his compensation data showed earnings far above those of his peers.
Together, these questions placed his entire record under intense scrutiny. With careful preparation, our team reframed the evidence and highlighted the client’s extraordinary impact on business and economic growth, while providing supplemental evidence and targeted legal arguments.
Get your free EB-1A visa profile evaluation today.

## From RFE to EB-1A Approval: Demonstrating Extraordinary Ability in Business and Investment Promotion
Attorney Nizar Kafrouni and the Colombo & Hurd team built a clear strategy to address USCIS’s concerns. “Our RFE team carefully reviews each notice to identify the specific challenges raised and outline a clear response strategy from the very beginning,” he noted. This approach ensured that every concern was addressed with stronger evidence and precise legal arguments.  Each issue raised in the RFE became an opportunity to present stronger, more detailed proof of extraordinary ability.
The response focused on several key areas:
- Original Contributions Evidence and expert letters highlighted innovative investment models and financial tools that attracted international capital and created new jobs. These outcomes proved his original and significant contributions to the field.
- Leadership and Critical Roles Letters from employers and institutional records confirmed that his leadership shaped major organizations and advanced national economies.
- Professional Membership Additional documentation showed that admission into an elite association required outstanding achievement, reinforcing that his selection was based on merit.
- Media Coverage The response documented the global reach of outlets such as Los Angeles Times , Forbes Mexico , and El Economista . Independent data confirmed their wide readership and international influence.
- High Compensation Comparative salary data and government statistics demonstrated that his earnings were well above industry standards in multiple countries.
This careful, well-rounded response significantly strengthened the petition. The evidence clearly showed that this Colombian business leader met multiple EB-1A criteria and had risen to the very top of his field.

## EB-1A Approval for Colombian Business Leader
USCIS approved the petition, recognizing him as a leading figure in international business development and investment promotion. This approval opened the door to continue his work in the United States, advancing trade relations, attracting investment, and generating new opportunities for growth and employment.
Attorney Nizar Kafrouni described the moment as an incredibly rewarding experience for both our clients and our team. “For this client, it represented the culmination of years of hard work and dedication, and the opportunity to pursue professional goals in the U.S. with confidence and stability.” He added that “seeing his joy when he learned the news reminded us why we are so passionate about this work” and called it “truly gratifying to know that our guidance and strategic approach played a part in helping him reach this important milestone.”
